name: Okta Repeated Unauthorized App Access Attempts (7 days)
description: Detects users with repeated unauthorized Okta application access attempts, aligned with public Okta detections in Elastic and Panther.
query: SELECT l.actor_id AS id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id) AS account_name, COALESCE(l.target_app_id, l.target_id) AS app_id, COALESCE(l.target_app_label, l.target_id, l.target_app_id) AS app_name, COUNT(*) AS unauthorized_attempts, MAX(l.published) AS last_attempt FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE COALESCE(l.actor_id, '') != '' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'app.generic.unauth_app_access_attempt' AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id), COALESCE(l.target_app_id, l.target_id), COALESCE(l.target_app_label, l.target_id, l.target_app_id) HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
remediation: Investigate repeated unauthorized app access attempts, validate user-to-app entitlements, and enforce least-privilege assignment paths.
